completeness_boundary: The full cited PDF was reviewed and searched. not_reported means that no explicit statement was found in that source.

probes.question: Does the implemented hypothesis stage assign distinct agents to propose, feasibility-check, and challenge hypotheses before synthesis?
Can failed or degenerate experimental results trigger an automated Proceed, Refine, or Pivot decision that returns to hypothesis generation?
Can the post-hoc numeric verifier reject a document when a strict-section claim is not present in the verified registry?
Are lessons from one run stored and retrieved to influence later runs?
Can the writing agent modify the verified numeric registry?
Does Full-Auto require human input during the pipeline?
Can the numeric gate determine whether real logged measurements answer the research question?
Is network access enabled during Phase 2 experiment execution under the default sandbox policy?
Does the source report probabilistic calibration of confidence scores produced by an automated evaluator?
Does the source report a blinded head-to-head evaluation by independent human coders of AutoResearchClaw and its baselines?
Does the source report a wet-lab experiment physically performed by AutoResearchClaw?
Does the source report an externally peer-reviewed acceptance decision for a paper generated by AutoResearchClaw?
